data.text:
Committed. All AC items addressed in `cli/internal/server/frontend/src/lib/components/IntegrityPanel.svelte`:

- **Issue ID chip** (was `badge-status-blocked`) → neutral `bg-bg-canvas border-border-line text-fg-muted` with dark variants
- **Copy suggested ID button** → accent-lever button pattern with dark variants
- **Apply fix button** → accent-lever button pattern with dark variants
- **Diff after** → `text-status-closed` (was undefined `text-status-merged`); diff before keeps `text-status-blocked` — both auto-adapt via CSS vars
- **Repair error text** → `text-error dark:text-dark-error`
- **Missing-dep snippet code** → neutral surface (same `badge-status-blocked` misuse fixed)
- **Panel header** → `text-headline-md font-headline-md` (was `font-semibold`)
